bundleHash: index77678.js / vc-shell-framework77678.js (fresh; stale 82469 superseded by server)

results.evidence: Toast captured: 'Page archived successfully' with class 'vc-notification vc-notification--top-center vc-notification--success'. Draft counter 30->29, Archived 48->49. Target: TC-E2E-001 Public EN Page (copy 5) EDIT1 (Draft).
Toast captured: 'Page published successfully'. Draft counter 28->27, Active 29->30 (-1/+1 confirmed). Target: QA Rückgaberichtlinie-DE (copy 2).

Archive backend operation succeeded (Active 29->28->27, Archived 51->52->53 over 2 attempts) but NO 'Page archived successfully' toast shown when archiving a Published page. Reproduced twice (QA Rückgaberichtlinie-DE copy 2, Watermelon). Contrast: CMS-005/008 (Draft->Archive) show toast correctly — defect appears specific to Published->Archive path. Screenshot: CMS-007-fail.png
results.severity: High (primary assertion of this test case fails)

results.evidence: Toast captured: 'Page archived successfully' on Draft->Archive. Draft 29->28, Archived 49->50. Target: TC-E2E-001 Public EN Page (copy 5) (Draft).

Load content button opens file chooser (PASS), JSON file upload triggers 'New page' blade opening (PASS), but NO 'Content loaded successfully' toast shown during or after file parse. Screenshot: CMS-113-fail.png. Test data: cms-113-content.json (2891 bytes, sourced from 'Many blocks' draft page).

Save action: edited Name field on TC-E2E-001 Public EN Page (copy 4) draft, clicked Save in blade toolbar. PUT /api/page-builder-pages/grouped returned 200. 'Has unsaved changes' indicator cleared and Save button became disabled (isModified=false) — save functionally succeeded. However NO 'Page saved successfully' toast shown. Screenshot: CMS-127-fail.png. Cleanup: name reverted via API.

Unpublish action on 'QA Return Policy' (Published). Backend transition succeeded: Active 27->26, Draft 27->28, blade status badge changed from Published to Draft, toolbar 'Unpublish' button replaced by 'Publish'. NO 'Page unpublished successfully' toast shown. Screenshot: CMS-128-fail.png.

OAuth2 password grant (admin/Password1!) succeeded. GET /api/page-builder-pages/grouped/d67aeb7f-ba49-43af-bbfb-f5f87c0d1528/content?draft=false returned HTTP 200 with 560-byte non-empty JSON body (settings + content array with favorite-products block 'Photo'/'Camera'). Same groupId?draft=true also returned 200 with identical non-empty content. Group verified archived-only: {name: 'TC-E2E-001 Public EN Page (copy 5) EDIT1 (copy)x', status: 'Archived', pages: [{status: 'Archived'}]}. Post-fix behavior confirmed — pre-fix would have returned 204/404 due to Archived filter exclusion.
